scope: Project-level reusable Gu Huaizhang multi-state character reference board.

locked_references.role: global low-magic eastern epic mood lock
project material and tactile surface lock
Southern old empire palette reference for preserved old-court vermilion, royal blue, moon-white, vine green, worn gold, old white stone, and damp dark-brown lacquer
locked Zhaoming emblem continuity reference only; do not redesign or replace
locked Zhaoming symbol extension reference for partial inherited embroidery, scroll seals, and worn pressure marks
Yan Nanzhi continuity reference; Gu Huaizhang's formal teaching state should explain her old-imperial pressure without copying her youthful silhouette
project costume-system rules: complete, functional, role-specific clothing; no new badges; old empire formal colors only where appropriate

downstream_usage: Prompt Room character identity lock for Gu Huaizhang
ComfyUI character reference input for Yan Nanzhi memory and blood-writ instruction scenes
Southern old empire costume and archive-hall continuity reference
Reusable prop/costume reference for red-line scrolls, damp-proof scroll tubes, and old-court robe fragments

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
Zhaoming sun-moon visual language must derive from locked references and appear only as partial inherited embroidery, worn pressure marks, scroll seal fragments, or small old-court hardware.
Preserve Gu Huaizhang as an older southern teacher and Fuyizhe pressure figure, not an emperor, immortal, wizard, monk, or generic villain.
Clothing must stay complete, expensive, role-specific, and adapted to humid southern conditions through light gauze, thin brocade, short over-jackets, scroll tubes, and damp-proof storage.
Distress and history should appear as humidity, cracked lacquer, tarnished gold, thread wear, and old debt, not as refugee rags.
No visible text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, or watermark inside generated images.
